title: Repair invalid signed link-frame vector
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7 validation: test/vectors/link_frame.json signed_encrypted vector marks a one-byte payload as signature-present even though a signature trailer requires 48 bytes; test/vectors/generate.py reproduces it. Python rejects the canonical vector while Rust defers rejection, leaving the full cross-language vector gate red. Repair from the link-wire specification and independent framing expectations without weakening parser tests.
acceptance_criteria: Generator emits a structurally valid signed-frame vector; canonical regeneration is deterministic; Python/Rust/C framing expectations agree; full vector suites and three independent reviews pass.
